title: BRAID Consumer Panel Highlights Public Priorities for Brain Health Research
body: The BRAID team recently held its first Consumer Panel engagement session, bringing together members of the public to discuss the future of brain health research, brain frailty, and the responsible use of AI and federated data infrastructures. Read about the key themes, recommendations, and our 10-month engagement roadmap. Read the full report

title: BRAID featured at DARE UK public webinar
body: BRAID was introduced at the From Capability to Research: Meet the DARE UK Research Exemplars webinar on 14 May 2026. The online event brought together researchers, data custodians, policymakers, and public representatives to hear how eight DARE UK Research Exemplars are putting emerging TRE technologies — including federated analysis and AI-assisted disclosure control — into practice.

title: BRAID Project Launches
body: The BRAID project officially kicks off, bringing together researchers from five institutions across the UK to advance federated brain frailty research.

title: Team Assembled
body: We are delighted to welcome our full research team spanning neuroimaging, federated analytics, data governance, and public engagement.
